package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_newbufferstring_on_string_conversion: `bytes.NewBufferString(string(b))` instead of using the byte slice directly.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario455Positive(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return bytes.Index(haystack, needle) != -1
}
